title: Fig. 2 in Leishmania presence in bats in areas endemic for leishmaniasis in centralwest Brazil
author: Castro, Ludiele S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 2. Agarose gel demonstrating kDNA PCR products (120bp). M: 100bp marker. 1–17: analyzed samples, of which 2–11, 13 and 16 were considered positive. PC: positive control of Leishmania spp., NC: negative control.
